name: Azure Sky Bar
description: Perched on the top floor with panoramic city views, Azure Sky Bar is the place to be for sunset cocktails, craft beers, and an upscale atmosphere that defines luxury.

menu.name: Azure Sunset
menu.description: Tequila, passion fruit, lime juice, and a hint of chili

menu.name: Pandin Mule
menu.description: Premium vodka, ginger beer, fresh mint, lime

menu.name: Old Fashioned
menu.description: Bourbon, Angostura bitters, sugar, orange zest

menu.name: Craft IPA
menu.description: Local craft Indian Pale Ale on tap

menu.name: Premium Wine Selection
menu.description: Curated selection of red, white, and rosé wines by the glass

menu.name: Cheese & Charcuterie Board
menu.description: Artisan cheeses, cured meats, crackers, and condiments

menu.name: Truffle Fries
menu.description: Crispy fries tossed in truffle oil and parmesan

name: The Ocean Lounge
description: An intimate, sophisticated lounge on the ground floor exuding relaxed elegance. Perfect for after-dinner drinks, business conversations, or a quiet evening with a fine whisky.

menu.name: Aged Macallan 18yr
menu.description: Single malt scotch whisky, neat or on the rocks

menu.name: Negroni
menu.description: Gin, sweet vermouth, Campari, orange peel

menu.name: Smoked Salmon Blinis
menu.description: Mini buckwheat blinis with cream cheese and smoked salmon

menu.name: Oysters (6 pcs)
menu.description: Fresh oysters with mignonette and lemon

name: Aqua Pool Bar
description: Enjoy refreshing drinks and light bites right at the poolside. Whether you're taking a break from swimming or soaking up the sun, Aqua Pool Bar has the perfect refreshment.

menu.name: Piña Colada
menu.description: Rum, coconut cream, pineapple juice, served frozen

menu.name: Frozen Margarita
menu.description: Tequila, triple sec, lime juice, frozen blend

menu.name: Tropical Green Smoothie
menu.description: Spinach, mango, banana, coconut water, ginger

menu.name: Club Sandwich
menu.description: Triple-decker with chicken, bacon, lettuce, tomato

menu.name: Fresh Fruit Platter
menu.description: Seasonal tropical fruits with yogurt dip
